headline: BlackRock's Rick Rieder Says Fed 'Patience' Is Right Call Despite $820 Billion Market Rout, Oil Spike
summary: BlackRock CIO Rick Rieder calls energy inflation spikes 'episodic,' justifying the Fed's patience on rates despite an $820B market selloff.

raw.headline: BlackRock's Rick Rieder Says Fed 'Patience' Is Right Call Despite $820 Billion Market Rout, Oil Spike
